heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by John Carpenter. Written by Bill Lancaster, based on the novella Who Goes There? by John W. Campbell Jr..
clean: Directed by John Carpenter. Written by Bill Lancaster, based on the novella Who Goes There? by John W. Campbell Jr..

heading: MacReady
raw: [on finding a partially-assembled spaceship beneath the tool shed] Blair's been busy out here all by himself.
clean: Blair's been busy out here all by himself.

heading: MacReady
raw: [the Thing roars at MacReady] YEAH, FUCK YOU TOO!!! [throws stick of dynamite]
clean: YEAH, FUCK YOU TOO!!!

heading: Others
raw: Norwegian passenger with rifle: Se til helvete og kom dere vekk. Det er ikke en bikkje. Det er en slags ting! Det imiterer en bikkje. Det er ikke virkelig! Kom dere vekk, idioter! (Get the hell away. That's not a dog. It's some kind of thing! It's imitating a dog. It's not real! Get away, idiots!)
clean: Se til helvete og kom dere vekk. Det er ikke en bikkje. Det er en slags ting! Det imiterer en bikkje. Det er ikke virkelig! Kom dere vekk, idioter! (Get the hell away. That's not a dog. It's some kind of thing! It's imitating a dog. It's not real! Get away, idiots!)

heading: Others
raw: Clark: I don't know what the hell's in there, but it's weird and pissed off, whatever it is.
clean: I don't know what the hell's in there, but it's weird and pissed off, whatever it is.

heading: Others
raw: Garry: [after passing the blood test] I know you gentlemen have been through a lot. But when you find the time... I'd rather not spend the rest of the winter TIED TO THIS FUCKING COUCH!
clean: I know you gentlemen have been through a lot. But when you find the time... I'd rather not spend the rest of the winter TIED TO THIS FUCKING COUCH!

heading: Others
raw: Norris: This is just what it wants! To pit us against each other!
clean: This is just what it wants! To pit us against each other!

heading: Others
raw: Windows: Are you guys gonna listen to Garry?! Are you gonna let him give the orders?! I mean, he can be one of those things!
clean: Are you guys gonna listen to Garry?! Are you gonna let him give the orders?! I mean, he can be one of those things!

heading: Others
raw: Blair: Hey, wait a minute. Wait a minute, man. I want to come back inside, don't you understand? I'm alright, I'm much better. And I won't harm anybody. Now you gotta let me come back inside.
clean: Hey, wait a minute. Wait a minute, man. I want to come back inside, don't you understand? I'm alright, I'm much better. And I won't harm anybody. Now you gotta let me come back inside.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: I don't know. Thousands of years ago it crashes, and this thing... gets thrown out, or crawls out, and it ends up freezing in the ice.
clean: I don't know. Thousands of years ago it crashes, and this thing... gets thrown out, or crawls out, and it ends up freezing in the ice.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: I just cannot believe any of this voodoo bullshit.
clean: I just cannot believe any of this voodoo bullshit.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Palmer: Childs, happens all the time, man. They're falling out of the skies like flies. Government knows all about it, right, Mac?
clean: Childs, happens all the time, man. They're falling out of the skies like flies. Government knows all about it, right, Mac?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: You believe any of this voodoo bullshit, Blair?
clean: You believe any of this voodoo bullshit, Blair?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Palmer: Childs, Childs... Chariots of the Gods, man. They practically own South America. I mean, they taught the Incas everything they know.
clean: Childs, Childs... Chariots of the Gods, man. They practically own South America. I mean, they taught the Incas everything they know.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Garry: So, come on now, MacReady, Norwegians get ahold of this... and they dig it up out of the ice.
clean: So, come on now, MacReady, Norwegians get ahold of this... and they dig it up out of the ice.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Yes, Garry, they dig it up, they cart it back, it gets thawed out, wakes up - probably not the best of moods - I don't know, I wasn't there!
clean: Yes, Garry, they dig it up, they cart it back, it gets thawed out, wakes up - probably not the best of moods - I don't know, I wasn't there!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Nauls: [skates in with ripped long johns] Which one of you disrespectful men been tossing his dirty drawers in the kitchen trash can, huh? From now, I want my kitchen clean, all right? Germ free!
clean: Which one of you disrespectful men been tossing his dirty drawers in the kitchen trash can, huh? From now, I want my kitchen clean, all right? Germ free!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: So how's this motherfucker wake up after thousands of years in the ice?
clean: So how's this motherfucker wake up after thousands of years in the ice?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bennings: And how can it look like a dog?
clean: And how can it look like a dog?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: I don't know how. 'Cause it's different than us, see? 'Cause it's from outer space. What do you want from me? Ask him! [motions to Blair]
clean: I don't know how. 'Cause it's different than us, see? 'Cause it's from outer space. What do you want from me? Ask him!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: You buy any of this Blair?
clean: You buy any of this Blair?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Norris: Finish what?
clean: Finish what?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Blair: Finish imitating these dogs.
clean: Finish imitating these dogs.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Somebody in this camp ain't what he appears to be. Right now that may be one or two of us. By Spring, it could be all of us.
clean: Somebody in this camp ain't what he appears to be. Right now that may be one or two of us. By Spring, it could be all of us.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: So, how do we know who's human? If I was an imitation, a perfect imitation, how would you know if it was really me?
clean: So, how do we know who's human? If I was an imitation, a perfect imitation, how would you know if it was really me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: All right, we gotta find him. Nauls, why don’t you come with me and we'll go outside. Palmer, you and Windows check the inside.
clean: All right, we gotta find him. Nauls, why don't you come with me and we'll go outside. Palmer, you and Windows check the inside.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Palmer: I ain't going with Windows. I ain't going with him, I'll go with Childs--
clean: I ain't going with Windows. I ain't going with him, I'll go with Childs--

heading: Dialogue
raw: Windows: Hey, FUCK YOU, Palmer!
clean: Hey, FUCK YOU, Palmer!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Palmer: I ain't going with you!
clean: I ain't going with you!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: Who says I want you going with me?!
clean: Who says I want you going with me?!

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: ALL RIGHT, CUT THE BULLSHIT! Windows, you come with us. Norris, you stay here. Any of them move, you fry them. You hear anything, anything at all, you cut loose on the sirens. We all meet here in 20 minutes regardless. And everybody watch who you're with, real close.
clean: ALL RIGHT, CUT THE BULLSHIT! Windows, you come with us. Norris, you stay here. Any of them move, you fry them. You hear anything, anything at all, you cut loose on the sirens. We all meet here in 20 minutes regardless. And everybody watch who you're with, real close.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: How you doin', old boy?
clean: How you doin', old boy?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Blair: I don't know who to trust.
clean: I don't know who to trust.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: I know what you mean, Blair. Trust's a tough thing to come by these days. Tell you what - why don't you just trust in the Lord?
clean: I know what you mean, Blair. Trust's a tough thing to come by these days. Tell you what - why don't you just trust in the Lord?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Blair: [throwing a fit in the radio room] Nobody gets in and out of here! NOBODY! You guys think I'M crazy! Well, that's fine! Most of ya don't know what's goin' on around here, but I'm damn well sure SOME of you do!
clean: Nobody gets in and out of here! NOBODY! You guys think I'M crazy! Well, that's fine! Most of ya don't know what's goin' on around here, but I'm damn well sure SOME of you do!

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Christ!
clean: Christ!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: He got most of the chopper and the tractor. And he's killed the rest of the dogs.
clean: He got most of the chopper and the tractor. And he's killed the rest of the dogs.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: [as Garry advances with his gun] Garry, wait a minute, wait a minute. Now, Childs, go around to the map room door. Talk to him.
clean: Garry, wait a minute, wait a minute. Now, Childs, go around to the map room door. Talk to him.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: Yeah.
clean: Yeah.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Norris, get a table from the lab.
clean: Norris, get a table from the lab.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Blair: [still smashing up the radio room with an axe while yelling] D'ya think that thing wanted to be an animal?! No dogs make it a thousand miles through the cold! No, you don't understand! That thing wanted to be US! If a cell gets out, it could imitate everything on the FACE OF THE EARTH! AND NOTHING CAN STOP IT!
clean: D'ya think that thing wanted to be an animal?! No dogs make it a thousand miles through the cold! No, you don't understand! That thing wanted to be US! If a cell gets out, it could imitate everything on the FACE OF THE EARTH! AND NOTHING CAN STOP IT!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: [appearing in the map room doorway] Okay, Blair. Come on, man, you don't wanna hurt anybody.
clean: Okay, Blair. Come on, man, you don't wanna hurt anybody.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Blair: I'LL KILL YOU!
clean: I'LL KILL YOU!

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Blair... he got back inside and blew the generator. In six hours, it'll be 100 below in here!
clean: Blair... he got back inside and blew the generator. In six hours, it'll be 100 below in here!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Garry: Well, that's suicide!
clean: Well, that's suicide!

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Not for that Thing. It wants to freeze now. It's got no way out of here. It just wants to go to sleep in the cold until the rescue team finds it.
clean: Not for that Thing. It wants to freeze now. It's got no way out of here. It just wants to go to sleep in the cold until the rescue team finds it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Garry: What can we do? What can we do?
clean: What can we do? What can we do?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Whether we make it or not, we can't let the Thing freeze again. Maybe we'll just warm things up a little around here. We're not gettin' outta here alive. But neither is that Thing.
clean: Whether we make it or not, we can't let the Thing freeze again. Maybe we'll just warm things up a little around here. We're not gettin' outta here alive. But neither is that Thing.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: You the only one who made it?.
clean: You the only one who made it?.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Not the only one.
clean: Not the only one.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: Did you kill it?
clean: Did you kill it?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Where were you, Childs?
clean: Where were you, Childs?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: Thought I saw Blair. I went out after him and got lost in the storm. Fire's got the temperature up all over the camp. Won't last long, though.
clean: Thought I saw Blair. I went out after him and got lost in the storm. Fire's got the temperature up all over the camp. Won't last long, though.

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Neither will we.
clean: Neither will we.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: How will we make it?
clean: How will we make it?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: Maybe we shouldn't.
clean: Maybe we shouldn't.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: If you're worried about me...
clean: If you're worried about me...

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: If we've got any surprises for each other, I don't think we're in much shape to do anything about it.
clean: If we've got any surprises for each other, I don't think we're in much shape to do anything about it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Childs: Well...What do we do?
clean: Well...What do we do?

heading: Dialogue
raw: MacReady: [slumping back] Why don't we just...Wait here for a little while? See what happens.
clean: Why don't we just...Wait here for a little while? See what happens.
